name: @cantaia/marketing-videos
description: Cantaia marketing videos built with Remotion

scripts.build: remotion render src/index.ts TheProblem out/cantaia-the-problem.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts TheSolution out/cantaia-the-solution.mp4 && remotion render src/index.ts TheProof out/cantaia-the-proof.mp4
